title: Tower T20082BLK Solitaire 2 Slice Toaster, Browning Control, 850W, Black with Chrome Accents
features: STYLISH DESIGN: Solitaire toasters have a high gloss body finish complete with stainless steel trim bringing a luxurious feel to any kitchen. The Solitaire 3D pattern is both eye-catching and designed using this season’s latest design trends

DEFROST & REHEAT FEATURING BROWNING CONTROL: Need a quick snack while on a time limit? Toast straight from frozen using the defrost function for snacks on the go. Variable browning settings ensures your bread has the perfect consistency and texture to suit your taste
REMOVABLE TRAY: Easily dispose of crumb mess and keep your kitchen countertop clean with the removable tray

LIFT & SELF-CENTRING FUNCTION: Let the toaster do the hard work for you. Use the lift function to easily grab the toast from the slots, preventing any nasty burns or injuries. Perfectly aligns your slices of bread in the centre of the toaster, evenly grilling each side for crisp and crunchy results
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and optional 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Look forward to your breakfast favourite with this stylish diamond patterned toaster Embossed in a 3D diamond pattern decoration, the Solitaire collection elevates modern design. The toaster provides 2 slots with enough space to fit bread and snacks of varying sizes. It uses adjustable browning control with 7 settings for selecting your ideal crunch. A self-centring function ensures you always get crisp, even results. There are options for defrost and reheat, allowing you to toast bread from frozen. A removable crumb tray and integrated cord storage to keep your surfaces tidy. Stylish design featuring a 3D pattern which is designed using this season’s latest design trends 2-slice toaster uses self-centring function to provide even consistency 7 browning settings for toasting to your liking Removable crumb tray to keep surfaces tidy High gloss finish with diamond shape decoration to elevate modern design in the kitchen DEFROST & REHEAT Quickly toast bread from frozen and reheat cold snacks conveniently SOLITAIRE COLLECTION Embossed in a 3D diamond pattern decoration, the Solitaire collection elevates modern design in the home LIFT FUNCTION WITH REMOVABLE TRAY Lift function elevates food so you can easily grab it from the slots whilst the pop-out crumb tray ensures an easy clean

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Defrost Mode, Removable Crumb Tray, Variable Browning Control
